query:
-- Air Restore → Air Restore NBN EE 100MB (C2EBB)
UPDATE phone_numbers 
SET customerExternalId = 'C2EBB'
WHERE provider = 'CommsCode' AND customerName = 'Air Restore' AND (customerExternalId IS NULL OR customerExternalId = '');

-- Gateway → Gateway Containers (C0100)
UPDATE phone_numbers 
SET customerExternalId = 'C0100'
WHERE provider = 'CommsCode' AND customerName = 'Gateway' AND (customerExternalId IS NULL OR customerExternalId = '');

-- Salter Brothers Luxury Collection → Salter Brothers Luxury Collection Operations (C0214)
UPDATE phone_numbers 
SET customerExternalId = 'C0214'
WHERE provider = 'CommsCode' AND customerName = 'Salter Brothers Luxury Collection' AND (customerExternalId IS NULL OR customerExternalId = '');

-- Spicers Retreats and Hotels → Spicers HO (C0214) - the umbrella account
UPDATE phone_numbers 
SET customerExternalId = 'C0214'
WHERE provider = 'CommsCode' AND customerName = 'Spicers Retreats and Hotels' AND (customerExternalId IS NULL OR customerExternalId = '');

-- Verify result
SELECT customerName, customerExternalId, COUNT(*) as count
FROM phone_numbers
WHERE provider = 'CommsCode'
GROUP BY customerName, customerExternalId
ORDER BY customerName;
